title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI); acts like ChatGPT locally.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama; supports generate, chat, embeddings, model management.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing async/sync bindings to the Ollama HTTP API with strong typing.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Convenience CLI wrapper for Ollama with prompts library and chaining utilities.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers via Ollama models with slash commands.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama models on macOS/Linux/Windows.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor and explain code using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper for Ollama HTTP API with Finch/Tesla clients and OTP-friendly processes.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration letting you inject Ollama service beans into Java apps.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed requests/responses and IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: Ollama Reddit community
summary: Active subreddit for sharing models, troubleshooting, integrations and feature requests.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger pipeline example showing how to build, test and serve Ollama models in CI.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-hnsw
summary: Lightweight Python service that wraps Ollama embeddings with HNSWlib for fast similarity search.
